scope.summary: Make the pinned plus stateless session footprint report honest and pin a regression test that fails if the report understates observed physical sessions.
out_of_scope: Current uncommitted README.md edit from another pane; committed README/docs wording is cited by SHA in the trace.
Physical-session teardown and SIGTERM/logoff verification owned by the B7 lane

entry_points.name: oracle_connection_info report
entry_points.trace: Committed dispatch code reports the primary connection as connection_strategy=pinned_plus_stateless whenever a stateless read connection is present, and exposes the stateless side separately as stateless_read_connection.

entry_points.name: understatement regression
entry_points.trace: `env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo test -p oraclemcp reported_footprint_never_understates_the_observable_session_count -- --nocapture` exited 0 on 2026-07-22; the test observed both primary and stateless physical handles and would fail if the reported strategy implied fewer sessions than were observably live.

entry_points.name: existing stateless strategy regression
entry_points.trace: `env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo test -p oraclemcp connection_info_reports_stateless_read_strategy_when_configured -- --nocapture` exited 0 on 2026-07-22; the existing regression still reports pinned_plus_stateless and a separate stateless_metadata_pool block.

entry_points.name: operator docs
entry_points.trace: README.md and docs/configuration.md document that user work stays on the pinned main session, stateless metadata reads use separate pool session(s), oracle_connection_info reports pinned_plus_stateless, and max_size caps the additional stateless connections; the Workstream P docs landed in 5259fba5.

entry_points.name: D-lane corroboration
entry_points.trace: Child bead oraclemcp-20cw3 closed with closing=67800b29f958268093571c99f22fc6ee2b595e79 and source=a6e5cea5d86248737b6439f464c5c4635f83b603 after a Free23 D-lane V$SESSION probe observed exactly three tagged sessions: one pinned primary plus two stateless pool sessions.

entry_points.name: diff hygiene
entry_points.trace: `git diff --check -- crates/oraclemcp/src/dispatch/tests.rs` exited 0 before the test commit.

limitations: The fresh D-lane V$SESSION capture is delegated to and closed by child bead oraclemcp-20cw3; this parent evidence cites that child close instead of duplicating the raw live probe.
The reported pool_open_connections value is the observed local stateless pool open count at the time of oracle_connection_info, not a count of unrelated database sessions.
